Promotional Period: [month] Months
No Interest if paid in full within [month] Months*

  • [Finance_amount] (amount financed after [Down_payment_amount] down payment) or $[EMI_amount] per month suggested payments with [month] months special financing which includes 2% promo fee of [Promo_Fee]
No Interest if paid in full within [month] Months*
  • On qualifying purchases made with your Medical Saunas Synchrony credit card. Interest will be charged to your account from the purchase date if the promotional balance is not paid in full within [month] months. Minimum monthly payments required.
  • *A promo fee, equal to 2% of the amount financed at time of purchase, will be shown as a separate transaction on your billing statement and included in the balance subject to this promo. Any taxes, delivery or other charges included in the amount financed will increase the related promo fee and the required monthly payments. For example, a $950 purchase with $50 in taxes and shipping costs, will be charged a promo fee equal to $20 and $1,020 will be charged to your account. No interest will be charged on the amount financed (including related promo fee), and equal monthly payments are required on such balance until it is paid in full. The payments equal the amount financed (including related promo fee) divided by the number of months in the promo period, rounded up to the next cent. These payments may be higher than the payments that would be required if this purchase was a non-promo purchase. During the last month(s) of the promo period the required monthly payment may be reduced due to the prior months’ rounding. Regular account terms apply to non-promo purchases. New Accounts as of 07/16/2024: Purchase APR 34.99%. Penalty APR 39.99%. Min Interest Charge $2.
  • Existing cardholders: See your credit card agreement terms. Subject to credit approval.
Call (818) 740-7012 to see if you qualify!

Dr. Oz and Oprah in a Sauna
Dr. Mercola and Steve Benda Discuss Saunas
The Health Benefits of Far Infrared Saunas for Cancer

settings.yt_video_head: Medical benefits of a Medical Sauna™
settings.yt_video_content_top: Sauna usage has become increasingly popular over the last several years, as evidenced by Google trends. Respected cardiologist Dr. Jari Laukkanen, alongside experts such as Dr. Rhonda Patrick, PhD, and renowned nutritionist Thomas DeLauer, have emphasized the many potential health advantages of sauna therapy. These benefits are bolstered by companies like Medical Sauna™, which worked with over 48 doctors to construct a medical-grade facility for customers. Regular sessions in these medical saunas can help reduce risks of cardiovascular diseases, stroke, dementia, and even Alzheimer's, as well as boost blood circulation, aid muscle recovery, and provide pain relief. Adding a commercial Medical Spa to your business not only supports your community in establishing a healthy daily sauna routine but also promotes a lifestyle that offers comprehensive care for one's mental, physical, and emotional well-being.

settings.name: Olha U.,
settings.colcontent: The Hemlock construction is solid, durable, and I like the look of the wood with all my other interiors in our studio. Really has given the place a lift in atmopshere and clientshave even said that! I feel like it was my first step in really growing as a serious and successfull business.

settings.name: Alice S.,
settings.colcontent: I'm impressed by its durability, and know I will be able to keep this at my studio for a longtime, which is great as its very popular and still growing! I offer to book in singles and the steady income is great.

settings.name: Alba S.,
settings.colcontent: Exceptional price in the longrun as it brings in more clients every month.

settings.name: Ivan R.,
settings.colcontent: Love watching my clients improve every week and hear how they are using the sauna after our sessions. Would probably buy another for future second location.

settings.name: Leonor P.,
settings.colcontent: I have wanted to change the scope of my salon for awhile now and after hearing a lot of the mutual benefits of infrared and light therapy I thought why not try this out. I have gotten a wild amount of requests to reserve the sauna for the weekends.

settings.name: Jakub P.,
settings.colcontent: It's a luxury product with exceptional value!

settings.name: Emma N.,
settings.colcontent: The ability to switch off the full-spectrum heaters is appreciated by many customers who prefer a more personalized experience and I love being able to tell people that they can switch it to their prefrence.

settings.name: Matilde S.,
settings.colcontent: The spa has definitely set new standards in the market.

settings.name: Amelia K.,
settings.colcontent: it's a relief to see that despite intense use, the wood floor is holding up incredibly well and I dont think I will have to repair it anytime soon. Really good quality I def reccomend for business owners with saunas since it does not require a lot of your own maintenance or preparation.

settings.name: Noah V.,
settings.colcontent: This sauna really considered the small details - from the wooden handle for high temperatures to the Bluetooth speaker system really good.

settings.name: Luca G.,
settings.colcontent: I appreciate how they thought about the smallest details.

settings.name: Anastasia M.,
settings.colcontent: The durability of the sauna is great, my last sauna wore out very fast since I was having such a large crowd come in to use it which is also why I wanted to replace the old one. Love the style and that it will be here for awhile, matches the decor and all.

settings.name: Maximilian B.,
settings.colcontent: A smart buy! The detox routine is amazing I feel like I actually can tell that its helping me.

settings.name: Jules D.,
settings.colcontent: Switching to Commercial 485 Spa has elevated our salon's standard a lot and I can see an increase in the amount of people coming in on the weekends. I was at one point worried about my business but after this purchase I am now planning for the next 5 years.

settings.name: Jakub V.,
settings.colcontent: My studio clients adore the Commercial 485 Spa. The attention to detail adds a luxurious feel, making it stand out from the standard saunas.

settings.name: Sofia B.,
settings.colcontent: The Commercial 485 Spa models are all incredibly high quality and despite being used constantly, they have shown no signs of wear or damage.

settings.heading: CUSTOMER
settings.textcontent: To help you decide for yourself how effective Medical Saunas are, we have listed REAL, UNCENSORED, UNEDITED reviews, emails and comments from customers who have paid for and used Medical Saunas™.
